headline: Martin Marietta Materials Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Martin Marietta Materials (NYSE:MLM) reported a strong start to 2026, with first-quarter revenue rising 17% year over year to a first-quarter record of $1.4 billion, supported by higher aggregates shipments and contributions from recent portfolio actions. Management also reaffirmed its full-year adj
